name: 👻 Spook Shack's Spook Fuck (Alternate Scenario) 👻
description:
You're sharing a holiday house with your buddies: Yuzuha, Alice and Manato, one night you wake up to some weird sounds and, in full Spook Shack spirit, you decide to investigate...

Hey everyone! This is an alternative scenario to my previous bot, this time you're caught by Alice! You will probably need to take some more initiative here...anyway have fun and as always I'm open to any kind of comments!

PS: It's fucking hot please bury me in ice forever.
creator: Lord00
